items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: MidCap Financial posts Q1 2026 NII of $0.38, NAV falls 2.5% to $13.82
items.snippet: MidCap Financial Q1 2026 NII was $0.38/share and NAV declined 2.5% to $13.82 driven by broader credit spread widening and weakness on certain positions.

items.title: 8-K — Officer / Director Departure or Appointment
8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: MidCap Financial posts Q4 2025 NII of $0.39, approves $100M share buyback
items.snippet: MidCap Financial Q4 2025 NII was $0.39/share and NAV fell 3.3% to $14.18; the board authorized a new $100M stock repurchase plan.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: MidCap Financial Q3 NII at $0.38, NAV dips 0.6% to $14.66
items.snippet: MidCap Financial Q3 2025 NII was $0.38/share and NAV declined 0.6% to $14.66/share on $138M of new investment commitments during the quarter.

items.headline_ai: MidCap Financial amends revolving credit facility to $1.61B, extends to 2030
items.snippet: MidCap Financial amended its revolving credit facility to $1.610B, extended final maturity to October 1, 2030, and cut the applicable margin by 10 basis points to 177.5 bps.

items.headline_ai: MidCap Financial Q2 NII rises to $0.39 from $0.37, NAV dips to $14.75
items.snippet: MidCap Financial Q2 2025 NII rose to $0.39/share from $0.37 in Q1, while NAV fell 1.2% to $14.75/share on $262M in new commitments.

items.headline_ai: MidCap Financial completes mergers with Apollo Senior Floating Rate, Apollo Tactical Income funds
items.snippet: MidCap Financial completed its mergers with Apollo Senior Floating Rate Fund (AFT) and Apollo Tactical Income Fund (AIF) and declared a $0.20/share special distribution.

items.headline_ai: MidCap Financial amends revolving credit facility; extends to 2028, switches to SOFR
items.snippet: MidCap Financial amended its $1.705B revolving credit facility, extending maturity to April 19, 2028 from December 2025 and switching the primary benchmark from LIBOR to SOFR.
